title: Funpack Absturz
description: Fun modpack with everything you need to play with your friends
body:
Funpack Absturz 2.1.0 is a Minecraft (Java, version 1.21.1, Fabric) modpack that has a bunch of mods for multiplayer, optimization, new decorations, better villages, cosmetics, and utility features. Good if you want a friend-friendly modded server with variety.

From backpacks to decorative objects to world generation, it's all there.
(Christmas, Halloween)
If you want, you can even brew beer.
A fun mod pack with everything you need.

Custom-built with the most common mods you know.
